title: Ado Music Discs
description: Ado's songs turned into music discs.
body:
This resource pack turns some of Ado's songs into music discs !

⚠️ **Required mod** to bypass the original song lengths auto-stop:
[Jukebox Custom Disc Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/jukebox-custom-disc-fix)

_(It might be kinda loud, so turn down your Jukebox/Noteblock audio)_

Songs Used:
1. 13 = [Stay Gold](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YVXy5ahojZk)
2. cat = [Readymade](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jg09lNupc1s)
3. blocks = [Odo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YnSW8ian29w)
4. chirp = [Shoka](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GORsp0gc2Nc)
5. far = [RuLe](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0Z_YqhYHhpg)
6. mall = [Mirror](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zsBBWBEZkFQ)
7. mellohi = [KokoroToIuNaNoFukakai](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BMb5IetESGE)
8. stal = [Crime And Punishment](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x1UsJ2Znjk0)
9. strad = [Gira Gira](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sOiMD45QGLs)
10. ward = [Charles](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=trIiMhTDKxo)
11. 11 = [Unravel](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eZuDklxsaRg)
11. wait = [Usseewa](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qp3b-RXtz4w)
12. Pigstep = [Backlight](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gt-v_YCkaMY)
13. otherside = [Elf](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SbxR25brgoE)
14. Creator = [New Genesis](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1FliVTcX8bQ)
15. Creator (Music Box) = [Show](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pgXpM4l_MwI) 
16. 5 = [Rockstar](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hRJpiCZlLX8)
17. Relic = [Value](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5iAQF_q6FSk)
18. Precipice = [All Night Radio](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lfw8W3uWO7s)
19. Tears = [Where the Wind Blows](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YO-rXgQKlF8)
20. Lava Chicken = [Chocolat Cadabra](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c5j7lpWprro)


_All rights to the music used belong to their respective owners. I do not claim ownership over any third-party content used._
